'''Vintul Qat''' was a [[Warrior caste|warrior]] of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. At the time of the Yuuzhan Vong occupation of [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]], Vintul was the [[Commander/Legends|Commander]] of a warship, and attempted to intercept the [[YZ-775 medium transport|YZ-775]] [[Transport/Legends|transport]], ''[[No Luck Required]]''.

==Appearances==
*"[[Emissary of the Void]]" {{Reprint|Emissary of the Void}} {{1st}}
